text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! I can't believe I lost!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I let them catch me and couldn't fight back. The
gap just got wider and wider...
choice_data_list: That's right, let it all out!
Next time, you'll leave them behind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This is seriously the worst! That last part keeps
playing back in my head!
choice_data_list: You look good right now, though.
You look good right now, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you making fun of me?
choice_data_list: You look like someone eager for victory.
You look like someone eager for victory.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Obviously! I'm not losing ever again!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I don't want anyone passing me again!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave them all in the dust. No one gets in the
way of my running!
choice_data_list: Then you have to become a winner.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Someone's talking big. Are you really that
confident?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then you'd better take on half the responsibility too. Go ahead and make me a winner!
